docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,915.00 FILED BY DAVIS, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC PARK MANAGEMENT INC. LIRA, FRANCISCO ( PORTSMOUTH SQUARE PARKING GARAGE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
